calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-06-2010 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jun-08-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Kenneth Greenstein, Esq. appeared with Joel Winter and Celilia Broadaway, who were placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by Pamela Jones.
Default was entered against defendant on December 8, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed on March 21, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiffs Joel Winter and Cecilia Broadaway, and against the Defaulted Defendant Pamela Jones as follows:

Damages/Principal - $48,121.24.
Attorney's Fees - $7,706.00.
Costs - $660.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $56,487.24.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
